title: Sales Channels - Adjusting the appearance of the self-service QR shop
workflow_title: Adjusting the appearance of the self-service QR shop

steps.caption: Welcome. This guide shows how to adjust the appearance of the self-service QR shop.
Under Self-service → Sales channels, click the pencil icon of your QR store.
Under Colors, set a primary and secondary colour via Hex code or the colour picker.
Under Standard product overview, choose grid view or list view as the default.
Under Logo, add your logo by dragging it in or browsing.
Under Images, customise the welcome, success, and error images.
Open the General menu (General then General) and click Send to transmit your changes.
